articles.title: HYUNDAI'S TOUCHSCREEN HONEYMOON IS OVER BECAUSE SOMETIMES BUTTONS ARE JUST BETTER
articles.summary: Hyundai is responding to customer frustration with touchscreens by returning to physical buttons for essential car controls. Testing revealed that touch-based systems caused stress, especially in urgent situations. Models like the Ioniq 6 now integrate both buttons and touchscreens.

articles.title: ATLAS.CO WANTS ITS WEB-BASED MAPPING TOOL TO BE THE FIGMA OF GEOSPATIAL DATA
articles.summary: Oslo-based startup Atlas.co offers a browser-based mapping tool that simplifies GIS data analysis. With features like real-time collaboration and spatial analysis, the tool eliminates the complexity of legacy software. Since launching in 2021, Atlas has attracted 20,000 users across 140 countries. Backed by $2M funding, it aims to revolutionize mapping for industries tackling climate challenges.

articles.title: GOOGLE ADDS AI CLIP ART GENERATOR TO GOOGLE DOCS
articles.summary: Google Docs now features an AI-powered clip art generator. "Help me create an image," which uses the advanced Imagen 3 engine, is available for paid Workspace accounts. It lets users create customizable illustrations by describing their vision and selecting styles like "Photography" or "Sketch."

articles.title: SEE MCDONALD'S NEW HOLIDAY CUPS, DESIGNED BY PHARRELL'S DOODLES
articles.summary: McDonald's is launching holiday cups designed by Pharrell's Doodles on November 18 accompanied by digital collectibles, a short film, and a new holiday song. The collaboration, which blends McDonald's branding with Doodles' cartoon aesthetic, aims to engage audiences through unique marketing across platforms like Spotify.

articles.title: AI FEATURES MUST SOLVE REAL USER PROBLEMS
articles.summary: Generative AI is revolutionizing design, but the core UX principles are the same. Products and features must address user needs, not just showcase technology. Poorly implemented AI, like unnecessary chatbots, frustrates users. Clear communication of AI's value and thoughtful design remain essential.

articles.title: CHOOSING THE PERFECT COLOUR PALETTE FOR YOUR WEBSITE: FOUR FACTORS TO CONSIDER
articles.summary: Using the right color palette enhances brand identity, conversions, and user engagement. Consider factors like the color wheel, psychology, combinations, visual hierarchy, and target audience. Consistent branding across platforms can boost awareness and evoke desired emotions.

articles.title: RECOLOR OBJECTS IN IMAGES
articles.summary: Transform image colors effortlessly with Colorixor's generative AI. The tool allows users to recolor objects in images with just a few clicks.

articles.title: MORE ENGAGING MEETINGS AND WORKSHOPS
articles.summary: Create engaging workshops that combine the best of presentation, interaction, and whiteboarding tools - all in an easy-to-use slide builder.

articles.title: FREE E-SIGNATURES
articles.summary: Securely send and sign any agreement with AI-powered workflows, free e-signatures, automated invoicing, and integrated payments.

articles.title: MEET LE DIMANCHE, THE STUDIO BRINGING A “SUNDAY KIND OF FEELING” TO DESIGN
articles.summary: Inspired by French culture and countryside roots, Le Dimanche Studio channels a “Sunday feeling” in its projects. It specializes in branding, illustration, and design for print and digital. The studio uses a slower, thoughtful approach when collaborating with wineries, restaurants, and artisan businesses.

articles.title: FROM INTIMIDATING TO EMPOWERING: FINANCIAL BRANDS FOR THE NEXT GENERATION
articles.summary: Financial brands are reshaping their images to connect with younger audiences through transparency, personalized tools, and a community-focused approach. They are aiming to make financial management approachable and empowering by leveraging social media and embracing inclusive values.

articles.title: HUION INSPIROY FREGO M REVIEW: AN ELEGANT TABLET, AIMED AT DIGITAL ARTISTS
articles.summary: The Huion Inspiroy Frego M is an affordable wireless drawing tablet with excellent accuracy and sensitivity. It is competitive with devices like the Deco Pro (Gen2) and Wacom One. While its Bluetooth performance is inconsistent, it's a strong choice for beginners.

articles.title: PHOTOGRAPHERS RECORD THEIR ATTEMPTS TO CREATE THE NEXT ICONIC WINDOWS WALLPAPER
articles.summary: Microsoft invited seven global photographers to create the next iconic Windows wallpaper.

articles.title: FIRST LOOK: ‘IT'S A CHAIR THAT SMILES AT YOU,' SAYS DESIGNER BRUCE HANNAH
articles.summary: Good design balances business and empathy and considers everyone involved - makers, users, and recyclers.
